title: Rob Milnthorp
compiled_truth: Rob Milnthorp is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2002-02-21), Rob Milnthorp sent 58 and received 905 emails, totalling 963 interactions. Top correspondents: [Louise Kitchen](people/louise-kitchen) (28), [John Lavorato](people/john-lavorato) (15), [Peter Keohane](people/peter-keohane) (10), [John Zufferli](people/john-zufferli) (10), [Derek Davies](people/derek-davies) (9). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, aec, canada, comp, deleted_items, inbox.
